projectDescription: A 100% client-side, cryptographically secure password generator with anti-bruteforce guards, entropy DNA visualization, and a unique Phonetic Shield mode — zero telemetry, zero data collection.
keyFeatures: Four generator modes: Password, Passphrase, PIN, and Phonetic Shield
Anti-bruteforce guards: blocks keyboard walks, weak fragments, ambiguous chars, and consecutive repeats
Entropy DNA visualization — per-character color-coded bar showing character class composition
Real-time entropy calculation with crack-time estimates (bits & time-to-crack display)
Phonetic Shield mode — pronounceable syllable-based passwords with injected high-entropy characters
EFF-inspired 200-word curated wordlist for passphrase generation
100% client-side — no backend, no telemetry, no cookies, works offline after load
Dark/light theme toggle with localStorage persistence
Customizable character pools, minimum character counts, symbol sets, and force-include characters
publicApiSurface: PassGen.generatePassword(options) — generates a cryptographically secure password
PassGen.generatePin(options) — generates a secure numeric PIN
PassGen.generatePhonetic(options) — generates a Phonetic Shield password with pronunciation guide
PassGen.buildPool(options) — builds the character pool for a given set of options
Entropy.getPoolSize(options) — calculates the effective character pool size
Entropy.calcPasswordEntropy(length, poolSize) — returns entropy in bits
Entropy.calcPassphraseEntropy(wordCount, wordListSize, hasNum, hasSym) — returns entropy in bits
Entropy.getCrackTime(entropyBits) — returns human-readable crack time estimate
Entropy.updateStrengthUI(entropy, prefix) — updates the strength meter DOM elements
Entropy.renderEntropyDNA(password, containerId) — renders the per-character DNA bar
